'''âk-d-l-m''' ('''kakadlemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alledg|alledg]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-d-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alledg|alledg]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-d-l-m
|-
! Lemma
| kakadlemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikadlemoko|thikadlemoko]] || [[word:jikadlemoko|jikadlemoko]] || [[word:shikadlemoko|shikadlemoko]] || [[word:kikadlemoko|kikadlemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukadlemoko|thuthukadlemoko]] || [[word:jujukadlemoko|jujukadlemoko]] || [[word:shushukadlemoko|shushukadlemoko]] || [[word:kukukadlemoko|kukukadlemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukadlemoko|thukadlemoko]] || [[word:jukadlemoko|jukadlemoko]] || [[word:shukadlemoko|shukadlemoko]] || [[word:kukadlemoko|kukadlemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukadlemoko|thukadlemoko]] || [[word:jukadlemoko|jukadlemoko]] || [[word:shukadlemoko|shukadlemoko]] || [[word:kukadlemoko|kukadlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekadlemoko|thekadlemoko]] || [[word:jekadlemoko|jekadlemoko]] || [[word:shekadlemoko|shekadlemoko]] || [[word:kekadlemoko|kekadlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokadlemoko|thothokadlemoko]] || [[word:jojokadlemoko|jojokadlemoko]] || [[word:shoshokadlemoko|shoshokadlemoko]] || [[word:kokokadlemoko|kokokadlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokadlemoko|thokadlemoko]] || [[word:jokadlemoko|jokadlemoko]] || [[word:shokadlemoko|shokadlemoko]] || [[word:kokadlemoko|kokadlemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokadlemoko|thokadlemoko]] || [[word:jokadlemoko|jokadlemoko]] || [[word:shokadlemoko|shokadlemoko]] || [[word:kokadlemoko|kokadlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkadlemoko|thĂŠkadlemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkadlemoko|jĂŠkadlemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkadlemoko|shĂŠkadlemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkadlemoko|kĂŠkadlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakadlemoko|thathakadlemoko]] || [[word:jajakadlemoko|jajakadlemoko]] || [[word:shashakadlemoko|shashakadlemoko]] || [[word:kakakadlemoko|kakakadlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakadlemoko|thakadlemoko]] || [[word:jakadlemoko|jakadlemoko]] || [[word:shakadlemoko|shakadlemoko]] || [[word:kakadlemoko|kakadlemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakadlemoko|thakadlemoko]] || [[word:jakadlemoko|jakadlemoko]] || [[word:shakadlemoko|shakadlemoko]] || [[word:kakadlemoko|kakadlemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
